childhood.familyBackground: Prince grew up in California in a middle-class family. His parents valued education and technology.
childhood.education: University of Chicago; University of Chicago Law School
childhood.earlyLife: Prince co-founded Cloudflare, a major internet security and performance company. He became a leading figure in web infrastructure and cybersecurity.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 프린스는 주요 인터넷 보안 및 성능 회사인 Cloudflare를 공동 창립했다.

careerTimeline.event: Co-founded Cloudflare with Michelle Zatlyn and Lee Holloway
careerTimeline.eventKo: 미셀 자틀린, 리 홀로웨이와 함께 Cloudflare 공동 창립

careerTimeline.event: Cloudflare IPO and major expansion of security services
careerTimeline.eventKo: Cloudflare IPO 및 보안 서비스 주요 확장

careerTimeline.event: Achieved billionaire status; Cloudflare valued at over 10 billion
careerTimeline.eventKo: 억만장자 지위 달성; Cloudflare가 100억 이상으로 평가받음

failures.description: Company faced criticism over content moderation policies and security challenges
failures.descriptionKo: 회사가 콘텐츠 중재 정책 및 보안 문제로 인한 비판에 직면
failures.lesson: Tech companies must balance free speech with safety and security concerns
failures.lessonKo: 기술 회사는 표현의 자유와 안전 및 보안 우려 사이에서 균형을 맞춰야 한다

quotes.text: Internet security and performance are fundamental infrastructure for the modern web
quotes.textKo: 인터넷 보안 및 성능은 현대 웹의 기본 인프라이다

recommended.title: The Web Application Hacker's Handbook
recommended.author: Various
recommended.note: Informed his understanding of web security vulnerabilities
recommended.noteKo: 웹 보안 취약점에 대한 이해를 알림

personalTraits.knownFor: Cloudflare founder; internet security leadership; web infrastructure expertise
personalTraits.knownForKo: Cloudflare 창립자; 인터넷 보안 리더십; 웹 인프라 전문성
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports internet freedom and cybersecurity education initiatives
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 인터넷 자유 및 사이버 보안 교육 이니셔티브 지원
personalTraits.controversies: Faced criticism over content moderation decisions
personalTraits.controversiesKo: 콘텐츠 중재 결정에 대한 비판에 직면
